bugs.error_message: vite build failed: The symbol "community" has already been declared in DetailedPointSheet.tsx
bugs.root_cause: The sheet declared const community twice in the same render closure after merging AI and local comment logic.
bugs.fix: Collapsed the duplicate declarations into a single filtered community array with All=50 and filtered=40 limits.

bugs.error_message: vite build failed: "AnimatePresence" is not exported by node_modules/motion/dist/es/index.mjs
bugs.root_cause: MarketPulseApp imported motion APIs from the package root while other tabs use the React entrypoint.
bugs.fix: Changed the import to motion/react so motion and AnimatePresence resolve during production build.

bugs.error_message: npm test failed in sandbox with Error: spawn EPERM while loading vitest.config.ts
bugs.root_cause: Vitest needed to spawn esbuild and the sandbox blocked the child process.
bugs.fix: Re-ran npm test with approved elevated permissions; the test suite passed.

bugs.error_message: npm run lint failed with existing no-explicit-any errors and server/scrapers/redditScraper.js duplicate declaration
bugs.root_cause: The repo has broad pre-existing lint debt across duplicated MarketPulse/src and src trees plus a parser error in redditScraper.js.
bugs.fix: Removed the newly introduced explicit any from the Pro payment bridge; broader lint debt remains a separate cleanup task.

bugs.error_message: npm run lint failed: Parsing error in server/scrapers/redditScraper.js because Identifier 'subreddits' has already been declared
bugs.root_cause: A merge left duplicate subreddits and comments declarations inside fetchRedditComments.
bugs.fix: Removed the duplicate declarations and kept the expanded subreddit list.

bugs.error_message: Vite dev server failed in sandbox with Error: spawn EPERM while loading vite.config.ts
bugs.root_cause: The sandbox blocked Vite/esbuild child process spawn during dev server startup.
bugs.fix: Restarted the dev server with approved elevated permissions; Vite selected port 5174 because 5173 was already in use.

bugs.error_message: Comment binding smoke test classified 'BTC 95000 support looks strong' as session_context instead of exact_price
bugs.root_cause: The price extractor only matched comma-formatted or k-suffixed numbers, so plain 4-8 digit market levels were ignored even with support/resistance context.
bugs.fix: Expanded the price regex to accept plain 4-8 digit levels while keeping percent/year filters and context checks.

bugs.error_message: Get-Content failed because src/types.ts does not exist
bugs.root_cause: The project exposes shared app types from src/types/index.ts, not src/types.ts.
bugs.fix: Located the actual type barrel with Select-String and updated the correct src/types/index.ts file.

bugs.error_message: API smoke test failed: localhost:3001 backend was not reachable and Vite proxy returned 500 for /api/market/chart
bugs.root_cause: Only the Vite frontend server was running; the Express market API process was not active on port 3001.
bugs.fix: Started npm run server in a hidden background process and verified /api/health plus timestamped chart data through the Vite proxy.

bugs.error_message: PowerShell command failed: Cannot overwrite variable PID because it is read-only or constant
bugs.root_cause: The restart helper used $pid, which is a protected PowerShell automatic variable.
bugs.fix: Re-ran the command with $serverPid and recorded the PowerShell gotcha in cerebrum.

bugs.error_message: Backend stderr showed ioredis ECONNREFUSED spam when Redis was not configured locally
bugs.root_cause: Cache and queue services attempted localhost Redis connections by default even when no Redis env vars were configured.
bugs.fix: Changed both services to skip Redis initialization unless REDIS_HOST or REDIS_URL is set, using in-memory fallbacks for local development.

bugs.error_message: Detailed point sheet still displayed @Investor / Smart money accumulating mock comments
bugs.root_cause: The frontend still fed chart overlays from getMockTranslations(), backend services used mock fallback comments when scrapers returned zero, and the sheet input was only visual.
bugs.fix: Disabled the mock translation feed, removed backend mock fallbacks from real insight paths, and wired the sheet input to create a first-party MarketPulse comment bound to the selected candle/price.

bugs.error_message: Polling the same asset/timeframe repeatedly started duplicate in-memory scrape jobs
bugs.root_cause: The non-Redis queue fallback launched a new processScrapeJob for every enqueue call without checking if the same scrape key was already active.
bugs.fix: Added an in-memory job map keyed by scrape asset/timeframe so duplicate requests reuse the running job and clear it on completion.

bugs.error_message: Backend logs spammed Gemini 404 model errors during local insight analysis
bugs.root_cause: The AI service attempted Gemini calls with an invalid/default model configuration instead of treating Gemini as opt-in local configuration.
bugs.fix: Require a real GEMINI_API_KEY and explicit GEMINI_MODEL before calling Gemini; otherwise use deterministic heuristic sentiment fallback.

bugs.error_message: User reported header logos were too close to the bottom divider and comments were not visible
bugs.root_cause: The header had top padding but no bottom padding, and comments were only discoverable through chart markers/sheets after mock data was removed.
bugs.fix: Added header bottom padding, increased main content top offset, and added a visible Comment Flow dashboard strip with counts and a direct analysis/detail action.

bugs.error_message: Comment Flow View selected the chart bubble but did not open the comment detail sheet directly
bugs.root_cause: Dashboard reused handlePointClick, whose first click only selects a marker and opens detail on a second click.
bugs.fix: Added openPointDetail and wired the Comment Flow button to open the selected comment cluster sheet immediately.

bugs.error_message: Opening a comment detail sheet automatically consumed an AI pulse credit
bugs.root_cause: DetailedPointSheet auto-called generateAIAnalysis when opened without an existing AI summary.
bugs.fix: Removed the auto-trigger so credits are only spent by explicit analysis controls.

bugs.error_message: Comment detail rendered a duplicate local comment as @undefined WEB
bugs.root_cause: Local MarketPulse comments from the selected cluster were rendered both in the own-comment section and in the external community section, and Card did not provide a safe display-name fallback.
bugs.fix: Filtered local comments out of the external community list and added safe user/source/community display fallbacks.

bugs.error_message: npm run lint intermittently failed with ENOENT reading vite.config.ts.timestamp-*.mjs
bugs.root_cause: ESLint attempted to read a transient Vite timestamp config module after it had already been removed.
bugs.fix: Re-ran lint after the transient file cleared; lint passed with warnings only.

bugs.error_message: User reported remaining mock data in Community screen showing Crypto King and Bear Hunter demo posts
bugs.root_cause: CommunityTab still imported and fell back to COMMUNITY_POSTS, plus User Ideas/Profile/Leaderboard used hard-coded demo personas. assets.ts also still exported obsolete mock comment generators.
bugs.fix: Rebuilt CommunityTab around Supabase comments plus first-party MarketPulse user comments only, passed userComments into the tab, removed visible demo profile/leaderboard/ideas, and removed obsolete mock community exports from assets.ts.

bugs.error_message: User reported real comments still were not appearing: 'gerçek yorum getir diyorum kaç saattir'
bugs.root_cause: CommunityTab rendered Supabase and first-party local comments but did not call the scraper-backed market insights endpoint, so external Reddit/TradingView/Investing comments could exist in the backend without appearing in the visible Community feed.
bugs.fix: Added a React Query fetchMarketInsights call keyed by selected asset/timeframe, passed active asset metadata into CommunityTab, merged scraper-backed MarketInsight comments into the feed with de-duplication, switched queue processing to lightweight source scrapers, removed remaining mock/fallback wording, and verified BTC returned 123 Reddit comments in API/browser.

bugs.error_message: User reported real comments arrived but their average was not appearing on the chart
bugs.root_cause: Backend produced commentClusters and Community rendered external comments, but the dashboard chart only auto-rendered local user comment clusters unless the paid/manual analysis path populated externalSentimentClusters. Marker vertical placement also used the candle price at avgIdx instead of the cluster avgPrice.
bugs.fix: Added an automatic selected asset/timeframe insight fetch in MarketPulseApp that maps backend commentClusters into SentimentCluster markers, and changed DashboardTab marker placement to use cluster avgPrice with viewport clamping.

bugs.error_message: User reported Hide News / Hide Consensus buttons did not work, marker counts were too high, and chart marker colors drifted from the original theme
bugs.root_cause: The toggles only controlled legacy activeTranslations overlays; external comment consensus markers rendered independently. The chart also rendered all visible clusters without per-screen caps and used mixed cyan/gray semantics for external consensus markers.
bugs.fix: Added capped displayed layer arrays, wired showAIConsensus to external comment markers, limited visible comment/consensus dots to 5 and news dots to 2, changed button labels to static News / AI Consensus, and restored color semantics: news blue, AI consensus white, user comments purple.

bugs.error_message: User reported expanded consensus bubble showed '15 price-linked comments' instead of a single average comment, and News button styling should match AI Consensus while news markers use the app gradient
bugs.root_cause: Dashboard rendered backend cluster.translation directly, which contained technical aggregation/count text. Small cluster markers also displayed raw counts, and selected news bubbles used a flat blue style instead of the app's blue-green gradient.
bugs.fix: Added average consensus copy generation for expanded external clusters, removed raw count labels from chart markers, made News button match AI Consensus styling, and changed normal/expanded news markers to blue-green gradient styling.
